item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 86 pts (0.462) Tampa Bay Lightning – 80 pts (0.444) Buffalo Sabres – 80 pts (0.43) Detroit Red Wings – 77 pts (0.407) Montreal Canadiens – 76 pts (0.415) Pittsburgh Penguins – 75 pts (0.41) New York Islanders – 75 pts (0.397) Boston Bruins – 73 pts (0.399) Columbus Blue Jackets – 72 pts (0.393) Ottawa Senators – 69 pts (0.377) Washington Capitals – 69 pts (0.365) Philadelphia Flyers – 67 pts (0.366) Florida Panthers – 65 pts (0.344) Toronto Maple Leafs – 65 pts (0.344) New Jersey Devils – 64 pts (0.344) New York Rangers – 56 pts (0.306) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
